title: Crasher's IoB Xaero's (PokeQuest styled)
description: Adds icons inspired by pokequest for isle of berk (and archipelago additions) dragons!
body:
**Hi! I'm Crasher. I like dragons a lot.**

_This is a resource pack that adds more depth to xaero's icons for the dragons of Isle of Berk and Archipelago Additions, because I wasn't really fond of the ones commonly used in most modpacks. I aim to add the rest of the dragons soon-ish!_

_Presently all the icons i've made are admittedly few in number. I plan to add the rest of the sharp class then move on to boulder. Please be patient!!_
